title: epidendrum globiflorum
intro: Epidendrum globiflorum, also known as the Globe-flower Orchid, is a species of orchid that belongs to the genus Epidendrum and is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The Globe-flower Orchid has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, which make it useful in treating various health issues such as wounds, skin infections, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Epidendrum globiflorum include reducing inflammation, preventing the growth of bacteria and fungi, and promoting wound healing, as well as providing relief from coughs and colds. The plant can be prepared as an infusion, tincture, or salve, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
